narrative:
Strasburg-Franklin Local Sd (Tusc) school district has 3,111 registered voters, with 56.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.8% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 17.1%, a clear Republican lean of 9.8 percentage points.
